name: Pasta and Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
GARNISH: grated Parmesan cheese, optional.
Cook pasta in boiling water for about 6 minutes, until al dente.
While pasta is cooking, heat oil in a Dutch oven or saucepan.
Stir in onion, garlic, and green pepper. Cook until tender.
Add remaining ingredients except macaroni. Cover and cook for 10 minutes.
When pasta is done, drain well. Stir into other ingredients. Heat.
Garnish if desired. Variations: substitute or add chopped sweet red shredded carrots to sauteed veggies; use 1 teaspoon basil and 1 teaspoon oregano instead of savory, thyme, and cayenne pepper.
